s: Feature riche, open source, AO3 mobile client
d:
A free reader app for Archive of Our Own (AO3). Built because other AO3 apps charge money for features that should be free. Features:
  • Custom library with favorites
  • Category management and organization
  • Reading history with filters
  • Native AMOLED support
  • Offline reading
No subscriptions, no ads, ever.
